metadata.version_note: Existing builder list is a hybrid; formation costs/counts are preserved from war/lists/CHAOS_titans_NETEA.json.

special_rules.name: Eternal Animosity
special_rules.text: Each non-Chaos Navy formation owes allegiance to one Chaos faction or Chaos Undivided. Khorne and Slaanesh cannot mix; Nurgle and Tzeentch cannot mix.

special_rules.name: Summoned Units
special_rules.text: Formations may summon daemons from a purchased Daemon Pool. Summoning uses 2D3 summoning points, units must be placed within 5cm of the summoning formation, summoned units are Expendable, and they are removed at the end phase unless retained by Daemonic Focus.

special_rules.name: Augment Summoning
special_rules.text: Units with Augment Summoning add their bonus to the formation's summoning roll.

special_rules.name: Daemonic Focus
special_rules.text: Units with Daemonic Focus may keep summoned units in play after rallying if the formation is not broken.

special_rules.name: Fickle Masters
special_rules.text: On a strategy roll of 6, add 1D3 summoning points to the Daemon Pool; on a 1, remove 1D3 summoning points.

special_rules.name: Unity of Command
special_rules.text: If the army is mono-faction and includes at least one Supreme Commander, it gains the relevant faction bonus.

special_rules.name: Hell-forged Weaponry
special_rules.text: Battle titans select an appropriate number of Battle and/or Scout weapons according to titan class and faction.

special_rules.name: Heretek Tech
special_rules.text: Shield Piercer ignores Power Fields, Knight Shields, Ion Shields, Void Shields and Shadowfields; Shadowfields still provide cover from shooting.

special_rules.name: Towering Incarnations of Chaos
special_rules.text: Destroyed Chaos Warlords and Imperators inflict Blast Markers on friendly formations as specified by the rule.

special_rules.name: Split Fire
special_rules.text: DC8+ war engines may Split Fire on Sustain Fire with an extra -1 activation penalty and special target allocation limits.

army_notes.name: Builder Source Of Truth
army_notes.text: Formation names, costs, allowed counts, upgrade costs, constraints and list structure are preserved from war/lists/CHAOS_titans_NETEA.json.

army_notes.name: PDF Reference Priority
army_notes.text: Traitor Titan Legions v2.31b is the primary profile/rules source; v2.2 and the QRS were used only as cross-checks.

army_notes.name: Hybrid Mismatch
army_notes.text: The builder list is a hybrid and does not exactly match either uploaded PDF.

army_notes.name: Chaos Navy Limit
army_notes.text: Up to one quarter of the total army points may be spent on Chaos Navy formations.

army_notes.name: Faction Selection
army_notes.text: Faction selection affects allowed weapons and formations.

army_notes.name: Battle Titan Weapons
army_notes.text: Battle Titans may choose Hell-forged weapon options according to titan class and faction.

army_notes.name: Pdf Mismatch Notes
army_notes.text: Builder Carrion Lord 1125, Forgelord 800 and Herald 600 do not match v2.31b or v2.2; builder Lord of Battles 400/725 does not match either PDF; builder Harbringer 375 does not match either PDF; builder Greater Brass Scorpion count/cost matches v2.2 rather than v2.31b.

army_notes.name: Rule Difference Note
army_notes.text: v2.2 includes Crippling Damage, while v2.31b uses Towering Incarnations of Chaos and Split Fire. The builder does not explicitly expose either rule set, so v2.31b wording is used for profile and rule reference.

extraction_warnings: Existing builder list is a hybrid and does not exactly match v2.2 or v2.31b.
Builder formation counts and costs were taken from war/lists/CHAOS_titans_NETEA.json, not directly from the PDFs.
v2.31b was used for profile and rule wording; v2.2 and QRS were used only to cross-check unclear areas.
Builder Carrion Lord 1125, Forgelord 800, Herald 600, Lord of Battles 400/725 and Harbringer 375 do not match either PDF.
Builder Greater Brass Scorpion count/cost matches v2.2 rather than v2.31b.
The PDF and builder differ on rule framing: v2.2 has Crippling Damage, while v2.31b has Towering Incarnations of Chaos and Split Fire.
Chaos Navy is limited to 25% of army points by the builder.
The builder list uses 199 upgrade entries; they are represented in the formations array as upgrade records.
